text: I feel a sense of curiosity and wonder standing here, gazing into this innovative, modern space devoted to R+D – research and development. The clean lines, bright blue neon, and colorful wall designs give the environment an almost futuristic vibe. I'm aware of both excitement about what knowledge or technologies might be discovered here, but also a faint sense of alienation: surrounded by glass and glowing lights, I wonder about the role of the human spirit amid so much apparent progress.
